name: Spotify
description: Spotify Web API provides access to Spotify's music catalog, user libraries, and playback controls. Search for tracks, albums, and artists, manage playlists, control playback on connected devices, and access user listening data.

capabilities.name: search_get
capabilities.description: Search Spotify's catalog for tracks, artists, albums, playlists, shows, and episodes by keyword.

capabilities.name: albums_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific album including tracks, release date, and artist info.

capabilities.name: albums_get_tracks
capabilities.description: Get the tracks of a specific album.

capabilities.name: albums_get_several
capabilities.description: Get details for multiple albums by their Spotify IDs.

capabilities.name: albums_get_saved
capabilities.description: Get the current user's saved albums.

capabilities.name: albums_save
capabilities.description: Save one or more albums to the current user's library.

capabilities.name: albums_remove_saved
capabilities.description: Remove one or more albums from the current user's library.

capabilities.name: albums_get_new_releases
capabilities.description: Get a list of new album releases on Spotify.

capabilities.name: artists_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific artist including name, genres, popularity, and images.

capabilities.name: artists_get_several
capabilities.description: Get details for multiple artists by their Spotify IDs.

capabilities.name: artists_get_albums
capabilities.description: Get an artist's albums.

capabilities.name: artists_get_top_tracks
capabilities.description: Get an artist's top tracks by country.

capabilities.name: tracks_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific track including name, artist, album, duration, and popularity.

capabilities.name: tracks_get_several
capabilities.description: Get details for multiple tracks by their Spotify IDs.

capabilities.name: tracks_get_saved
capabilities.description: Get the current user's saved (liked) tracks.

capabilities.name: tracks_save
capabilities.description: Save one or more tracks to the current user's library.

capabilities.name: tracks_remove_saved
capabilities.description: Remove one or more tracks from the current user's library.

capabilities.name: playlists_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific playlist including its tracks.

capabilities.name: playlists_get_items
capabilities.description: Get the items (tracks/episodes) of a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new playlist for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: playlists_update
capabilities.description: Change a playlist's name, description, or public/private state.

capabilities.name: playlists_add_items
capabilities.description: Add one or more tracks or episodes to a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlists_remove_items
capabilities.description: Remove one or more items from a playlist.

capabilities.name: playlists_get_current_user
capabilities.description: Get the current user's playlists.

capabilities.name: playlists_get_user
capabilities.description: Get a specific user's public playlists.

capabilities.name: playlists_get_featured
capabilities.description: Get Spotify's featured playlists.

capabilities.name: player_get_state
capabilities.description: Get information about the user's current playback state.

capabilities.name: player_get_devices
capabilities.description: Get the user's available Spotify-connected devices.

capabilities.name: player_get_currently_playing
capabilities.description: Get the currently playing track or episode.

capabilities.name: player_start_resume
capabilities.description: Start or resume playback on the user's active device.

capabilities.name: player_pause
capabilities.description: Pause playback on the user's active device.

capabilities.name: player_skip_next
capabilities.description: Skip to the next track in the user's queue.

capabilities.name: player_skip_previous
capabilities.description: Skip to the previous track.

capabilities.name: player_seek
capabilities.description: Seek to a position in the currently playing track.

capabilities.name: player_set_volume
capabilities.description: Set the volume for the user's current playback device.

capabilities.name: player_toggle_shuffle
capabilities.description: Toggle shuffle on or off for the user's playback.

capabilities.name: player_set_repeat
capabilities.description: Set the repeat mode for the user's playback.

capabilities.name: player_get_queue
capabilities.description: Get the user's current playback queue.

capabilities.name: player_add_to_queue
capabilities.description: Add a track or episode to the user's playback queue.

capabilities.name: player_transfer
capabilities.description: Transfer playback to a different device.

capabilities.name: player_get_recently_played
capabilities.description: Get the user's recently played tracks.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: users_get_profile
capabilities.description: Get a user's public profile.

capabilities.name: users_get_top_items
capabilities.description: Get the current user's top artists or tracks.

capabilities.name: users_follow_artists
capabilities.description: Follow one or more artists or users.

capabilities.name: users_unfollow_artists
capabilities.description: Unfollow one or more artists or users.

capabilities.name: users_get_followed_artists
capabilities.description: Get the user's followed artists.

capabilities.name: shows_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific podcast show.

capabilities.name: shows_get_episodes
capabilities.description: Get the episodes of a specific podcast show.

capabilities.name: episodes_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a specific podcast episode.

capabilities.name: genres_get_seeds
capabilities.description: Get available genre seeds for recommendations.

capabilities.name: markets_get
capabilities.description: Get the list of available Spotify markets.
